coat_colors: tricolor - black with tan and white markings

description.overview: The Entlebucher is the smallest of the four Swiss Mountain Dogs, bred for herding cattle in the Alps.
description.temperament: Entles are loyal, smart, and enthusiastic. They're devoted to family and excel at various dog sports.
description.health: Prone to hip dysplasia and eye problems (PRA).
description.exercise: High energy. Need vigorous daily exercise and mental challenges.

verdict.summary: The smallest Swiss Mountain Dog with big energy and loyalty. Entles are smart, athletic, and devoted - perfect for active families.
